questions.question: Explain the working of Linear Search algorithm with an example.
keyPoints: Return -1 if not found after checking all
questions.modelAnswer: Linear search sequentially checks each element until the target is found or the list ends. For array [64, 34, 25, 12, 22] searching for 25: Compare 64!=25, Compare 34!=25, Compare 25==25, Return index 2.

questions.question: Analyze the time and space complexity of Linear Search. When is it preferred over Binary Search?
keyPoints: Time: Best O(1), Average O(n), Worst O(n)

questions.question: Write an algorithm for Linear Search and trace it for the array [15, 10, 25, 30, 5] to find element 30.
Compare Linear Search and Binary Search algorithms.
